movie.synopsis: A young Foley artist has grown up hearing a mysterious voice called Suyodhana and often visualises a figure resembling Duryodhana. Raised by his mother and supported by his childhood friend and partner, his life takes a turn when he is accused of his father’s murder, leading to an investigation that uncovers deeper layers of his past.
